Class SceneManager

java.lang.Object
application.SceneManager
public class SceneManager extends Object
Central scene coordinator for the game. Owns the primary Stage and is responsible for transitioning between all screens: main menu, game world, boss room, and game-over screen.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    H
    The fixed window height in pixels.
    static final int
    W
    The fixed window width in pixels.

  • Constructor Details

    • SceneManager

      public SceneManager(javafx.stage.Stage stage)
      Creates a new SceneManager and configures the window dimensions.
      Parameters:
      stage - the primary JavaFX stage to manage

  • Method Details

    • showMainMenu

      public void showMainMenu()
      Transitions to the main menu screen and starts the menu BGM.

    • showGame

      public void showGame(Player player, Pickaxe pickaxe)
      Transitions to the main game world screen.
      Parameters:
      player - the player character to use in the game
      pickaxe - the starting pickaxe for the player

    • showBossRoom

      public void showBossRoom(Player player, Pickaxe[] pickaxeHolder)
      Transitions to the boss battle room and starts the boss BGM.
      Parameters:
      player - the player entering the boss room
      pickaxeHolder - a single-element array holding the current pickaxe, passed by reference so the boss scene can read upgrades

    • showGameOver

      public void showGameOver(boolean won, Player player)
      Transitions to the game-over / victory screen.
      Parameters:
      won - true if all bosses were defeated, false if the player died
      player - the player whose final stats are displayed
